mapper.sql: id, message_id, conversation_id, user_id, read_time, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM im_message_read_detail WHERE message_id = #{messageId} ORDER BY read_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_message_read_detail (message_id, conversation_id, user_id, read_time, create_time) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{conversationId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE read_time = VALUES(read_time)
